articles.title: Ripple insists on deposing former high-ranking SEC official as part of XRP lawsuit
articles.description: Ripple Labs, the blockchain company behind the XRP token that is currently locked in a $1.3 billion legal battle with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), has rescheduled the deposition of William Hinman, the SEC’s former director of Division of Corporation Finance, to July 19, according to court filing published last Friday.

articles.title: VeChain Partners With Shopping.io To Enable VET Holders Shop With Vet On Amazon, Ebay, Walmart, And Etsy
articles.description: Shopping.io took to its official Medium to announce its recent partnership with VeChain. The partnership was struck to enable VET holders to shop on Amazon, Ebay, Walmart, and Etsy using their VET coins. VET holders across seven countries will be able to use this feature to shop using their VET coins. Related Reading | Forget Amazon […]

The New PancakeSwap on Polygon? DinoSwap Hype Rises Ahead of Launch
articles.description: DinoSwap, a yield farming platform on Polygon, which works similarly as PancakeSwap farming pools, is launching this week. It launches with investments from top DeFi funds, such as Defiance, Hashed, Spartan Group, and DFG, as well as the founder of Polygon, Sandeep Nailwal. Why the Positioning of DinoSwap on Polygon is Unique Polygon has been […]

articles.title: Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund Becomes SEC Reporting Company
articles.description: Grayscale Investments has announced that its Digital Large Cap Fund has become a reporting company, with additional filings for Bitcoin Cash (BCH), Litecoin (LTC), and Ethereum Classic (ETC).
